---
name: Learning feedback
about: Tell us how a level or lab worked for you as a learner
title: "[feedback] "
labels: feedback
---

## Which level / lab?

e.g. Level 1 — Lab 02

## What was clear?

What worked well and helped you make progress.

## What was confusing?

Where the instructions or expectations were unclear.

## Where did you get stuck?

The specific step, command or concept.

## How long did it take?

Roughly, vs. the estimated time.

## What evidence did you produce?

Which artifacts you filled in (e.g. `problem-framing.md`, `manual-baseline.md`).

## Did you avoid real data?

- [ ] Yes — I used only synthetic data, no secrets and no real PII.

## Suggestions

How would you improve this lab?
